version_description: These chords were derived from previous other versions. These are not the exact chords from the song, but sounds great without the second guitar (like in the song). Have fun with it :).
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Complete and well-aligned chord sheet for the whole song / suggestions for playable voicings / F#m7-5 in the verses.

content:
Capo 4th Fret:

Chords Used:

[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]

A:X    A:2    A:2    A:3    A:0    A:0

[Intro]

[ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Look around your world pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Is it everything you hoped it would be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
The wrong guy the wrong situation[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
The right time to roll to me                   Roll to me[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Look into your heart pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
Is it aching with some nameless need[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Is there something wrong and you can't put your finger on it[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Right then     roll to me[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
And I don't think I have ever seen a soul so in despair[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
So if you want to talk the night through[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Guess who will be there[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
So dont try to    deny it   pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
You've been down so long you can hardly see[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
When the engine's stalled and it wont stop raining[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  (x2)
Its the right time to roll to me                    Roll to me[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
And I don't think I have ever seen a soul so in despair[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
So if you want to talk the night through[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
Guess who will be there[/tab]


Repeat Verse 1

[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
So Look around your world pretty baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Is it everything you hoped it would be[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
The wrong guy the wrong situation[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   (x2)
The right time to roll to me                         Roll to me[/tab]
